generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleData
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedData
]

instance Arduino : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Handles sensor measurement and control for the physical system"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ArduinoControlData
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance ArduinoControlData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Arduino
]

instance SwingAngleTimeSeries : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series swing angle measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, MQTTBroker
]

instance WindSpeedTimeSeries : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series wind speed measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, MQTTBroker
]

instance ArduinoControlTimeSeries : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Arduino control signals and sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ArduinoControlData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, MQTTBroker
]

instance CartMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for cart movement"
]

instance HoistMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for hoist movement"
]

instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor for cart movement"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor for hoist movement"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Used for container pickup"
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization platform for digital twin services"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService, VisualizationService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for historical data logging"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization tool for real-time trajectory monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Message broker for real-time data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance Gantrylib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module for gantry crane control and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService
]

instance ArduinoIDE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Development environment for Arduino-based control"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlSystemService
]

instance Fusion360 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "CAD software for creating digital twin models"
    DTDFVocab:enables CADModelService
]

instance DarTwin : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "DarTwin notation tool for system evolution"
    DTDFVocab:enables SystemEvolutionService
]

instance Capella : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Capella-based Arcadia tool for MBSE"
    DTDFVocab:enables SystemDesignService
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D CAD model of the gantry crane created in Fusion360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Fusion360
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Mathematical model for trajectory generation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model for trajectory validation simulations"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationService
]

instance DarTwinModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "System evolution model using DarTwin notation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DarTwin
]

instance CapellaModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Capella-based Arcadia model for MBSE"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Capella
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal trajectories using kinematic models"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryPlanInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares simulated vs. executed trajectories for validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationAlertInsight, FaultLocalizationInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logs historical data to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStorageInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time trajectory visualization via Grafana"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates trajectory execution for validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Monitors real-time sensor data via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeDataInsight
]

instance ControlSystemService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Controls physical components via Arduino"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlSignalInsight
]

instance SystemEvolutionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Manages system evolution using DarTwin"
    DTDFVocab:provides EvolutionInsight
]

instance SystemDesignService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Designs system using Capella MBSE"
    DTDFVocab:provides DesignInsight
]

instance CADModelService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Creates CAD models using Fusion360"
    DTDFVocab:provides CADModelInsight
]

instance TrajectoryPlanInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory plan generated by kinematic model"
]

instance ValidationAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Threshold-based alerts for crane operation adjustments"
]

instance DataStorageInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data storage in TimescaleDB"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time trajectory visualization"
]

instance SimulationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Results from trajectory simulation validation"
]

instance RealTimeDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor data monitoring"
]

instance ControlSignalInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Control signals sent to physical components"
]

instance EvolutionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "System evolution status using DarTwin"
]

instance DesignInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "System design status using Capella MBSE"
]

instance CADModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "CAD model creation status"
]

instance FaultLocalizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Fault localization using time series classification"
]

instance AdjustCraneOperation : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator adjustment of crane operation based on alerts"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance GantryCraneTwinSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Centralized digital twin system for lab-scale gantry crane"
    base:contains Docker, TimescaleDB, Grafana, MQTTBroker, Gantrylib, Fusion360, DarTwin, Capella, TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, VisualizationService, HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control Application sends movement commands to Physical Crane Interface for cart/hoist motion, homing, and zeroing operations based on trajectory generation and operator inputs."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous synchronization for monitoring and validation services; specific time rates not documented."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Centralized constellation integrating physical crane components with digital services (database, dashboard, trajectory generator, simulation) via MQTT communication and Python modules, deployed on a single PC using Docker containers for database, broker, and dashboard."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational lifecycle stage (as operated), with digital twin models derived from design phase for continuous validation during crane operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation using distance metrics between simulated and measured trajectories, with threshold-based breach notifications for operator intervention."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol (Eclipse Mosquitto) for inter-service communication, Python-based interfaces for physical controller interaction, and SQL queries for TimescaleDB data access."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Deployed on a single personal computer using Docker containers for TimescaleDB, Eclipse Mosquitto, and Grafana; Python gantrylib module installed via pip."
]
